chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. B.A. No.2759 of 2025 (Alam Zaib @ Akhtar vs. The State) Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro Mr. Justice Syed Fiaz-ul-Hassan Shah For hearing of bail application Date of hearing & order 24.11.2025 M/s Shamsul Hadi and Abdul Jalil advocate for applicant Mr. Ali Haider Saleem, Addl: PG Sindh O R D E R ----- Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J:- Applicant was arrested on 02.08.2025 from behind wall of KEPZ Road opposite Soda Factory, Malir Karachi by Police of Police Station Sukhan Malir, Karachi, and from him 505 grams of Ice was recovered. Hence, this FIR. 2. Learned counsel for the applicant has argued that applicant is a first offender and the case does not fall within the prohibitory clause u/s 497 Cr. PC; that the investigation is complete and the applicant is no more required for further investigation.. 3. His arguments have been opposed by Learned Addl: Prosecutor General but it is an admitted that the applicant is a first offender and is no more required for further investigation as the challan has been submitted in the trial Court. More so, the offence does not fall within the prohibitory clause u/s 497 Cr.PC. Accordingly, this application is allowed and applicant is granted bail subject to his furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.1,00,000/ (Rupees one lac) with P.R. bond in the like amount to be executed to the satisfaction of the trial Court. 4. The bail application is disposed of in the above terms; the findings made hereinabove are tentative in nature and would not prejudice case of either party at trial. JUDGE JUDGE Rafiq/PA.
